title: rubus serpens var. calligynus
intro: Rubus serpens var. calligynus, also known as the creeping raspberry, is a variety of the rubus serpens plant that belongs to the rose family. It is a low-growing, thorny, and woody vine with edible fruits, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus serpens var. calligynus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
